hero.desc: Speech to speech pipelines, LLM fine tuning, RAG systems, and intelligent automation — designed for production, optimized for your industry.

services.title: AI solutions across the full stack
services.desc: From voice pipelines to enterprise automation — we design, train, and deploy systems that run in production.

items.title: n8n Automations
items.desc: End to end no code AI workflows — from data pipelines to customer facing agents. Automate operations at scale.

items.title: AI Speech to Speech
items.desc: End to end real time voice AI — Whisper ASR, custom TTS, LLM reasoning. Sub second latency, production ready pipelines.

items.title: LLM Fine Tuning
items.desc: Domain specific model training with LoRA, 4 bit quantization, and Unsloth. Hardware agnostic deployment — cloud, on prem, or edge.

items.title: RAG & Knowledge Systems
items.desc: Secure, offline retrieval augmented generation over your private data. FAISS, Pinecone, semantic reranking, guardrails.

items.title: AI Automation (n8n)
items.desc: Intelligent workflow automation connecting your APIs, databases, and AI models. No ops pipelines that run themselves.

items.title: Mobile App Development
items.desc: AI powered iOS & Android apps — from idea to App Store. We build and ship products with embedded intelligence.

items.title: AI Architecture & Consulting
items.desc: System design, tech roadmap, model selection, and on prem GPU deployment. We help you build the right thing, right.

core.title: Real time speech AI with sub second latency
core.desc: We build full stack voice agents that understand, reason, and respond — in Turkish and English. From ASR to TTS with LLM at the core.
bullets: Whisper Large v3 fine tuned for Turkish ASR
Custom TTS with all of Turkish models (LLM, TS, STT) and PiperTTS voice cloning
LiveKit powered real time communication layer

Deployable on RunPod, on prem A100/H100, or serverless
